SuicideMelee.name: Melee Attack
SuicideMelee.description: A melee attack that also damages yourself.

DrinkUp.name: Bottoms Up
DrinkUp.description: Gain 5HP. Can only be used when standing in water.

Counterspell.name: Counterspell
Counterspell.description:
Counter the next spell an enemy casts.
If counterspell isn't triggered by your next turn, absorb it to gain +2 Damage and +2 All Stats Up.

BrainDrainMagicMissile.name: Brain Missile
BrainDrainMagicMissile.description: Shoot an infinite-range projectile that can't miss.

KirbySuck.name: Suck
KirbySuck.description: Inhale a unit, then spit it out.

KirbySpit.name: Suck
KirbySpit.description: Inhale a unit, then spit it out.

DruidCatBasic.name: Sing
DruidCatBasic.description: Heal and give +1 Temporary Damage to units in a wide area.

FleshLadDoublehit.name: Double Hit
FleshLadDoublehit.description: A melee attack that hits twice.

FleshLadUppercut.name: Uppercut
FleshLadUppercut.description:
Punch a unit, knocking it back 3 tiles and inflicting Bruise.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

Dclaude_Declaw.name: Declaw
Dclaude_Declaw.description: A melee attack that inflicts -1 Damage and Bleed.
